Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents At Trial And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances stated, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Plaintiff Janna Sundeyevas Motion to compel production of documents at trial and for sanctions granted in part, denied in part:
1. Motion to compel production of documents at trial granted;
2. Each defendant shall produce those documents in their custody, or under their control that are responsive to the document requests;
3. Production of documents at trial is without prejudice to any claim of privilege, objection to admissibility, or motion in limine that may be raised in the trial court;
4. Motion for sanctions denied.
5. In lieu of production of medical records defendant may produce those records in electronic form such as Quickbooks. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JANNA SUNDEYEVA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE VERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
